message:
feat(db): reconstruct file reservations from archive storage

- Add Phase 2b to archive reconstruction: discover and import
  file_reservations/*.json artifacts so robot/status reads can
  rebuild project-scoped lease views from the archive alone
- Handle both canonical (id-NNN.json) and mirrored (hash.json)
  reservation artifacts with INSERT OR REPLACE deduplication
- Parse agent name, path_pattern, exclusive flag, reason, and
  timestamp fields from reservation JSON
- Add test verifying reconstruction recovers reservations and
  deduplicates mirrored artifacts

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
